permission.statement: The project owner reports explicit confirmation from the vr_strobe creator to port the work under the general Rusty Morphospace license.

deployment_observation.homepage_note: The deployed homepage differs from the pinned repository index; the pinned repository is source authority and the deployed site remains behavioral comparison evidence.

boundary: This receipt records the permission relayed for the pinned source. It does not transfer WebXR runtime authority, medical claims, headset safety acceptance, or temporal device-run authorization into Rusty Quest.
